beginner.title: Was / Were: Past Simple of 'be'
beginner.content:
📌 Khi nào dùng WAS / WERE
Dùng was / were là dạng quá khứ của am / is / are để nói về:
• Trạng thái / cảm xúc trong quá khứ: I was tired. They were happy.
• Nghề nghiệp / danh tính trong quá khứ: She was a teacher. He was a student.
• Địa điểm trong quá khứ: We were at home. The keys were on the table.
• Tuổi / mô tả trong quá khứ: He was ten years old. The film was boring.
• Thời tiết / hoàn cảnh: It was cold. The streets were quiet.
📐 Công thức đầy đủ
Chủ ngữKhẳng địnhPhủ địnhCâu hỏi
I / He / She / Itwaswas not / wasn'tWas I/he/she/it…?
You / We / Theywerewere not / weren'tWere you/we/they…?
✅ Trả lời ngắn (Short answers)
Was she at school? – Yes, she was. / No, she wasn't.
Were they happy? – Yes, they were. / No, they weren't.
Was it cold? – Yes, it was. / No, it wasn't.
🔑 Dấu hiệu thời quá khứ
yesterday, last night / week / month / year, ago, in 2010, when I was young, at that time, in those days, then, before
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ They was very tired. → ✅ They were very tired.
❌ She were at home. → ✅ She was at home.
❌ Was you at the party? → ✅ Were you at the party?
❌ Yes, they was. → ✅ Yes, they were.
❌ It were a great film. → ✅ It was a great film.
I was very nervous before the exam.Tôi đã rất lo lắng trước kỳ thi.
Were you at home last night? – Yes, I was.Tối qua bạn có ở nhà không? – Có.
The weather was beautiful, but the roads were very busy.Thời tiết đẹp, nhưng đường rất đông.

exercises.q: She ___ very happy when she heard the news.
___ you at home last night?
They ___ not ready for the exam at all.
It ___ a really cold morning in December.
Was the film good? – No, it ___.
My parents ___ born in the 1970s.
Where ___ you last Sunday afternoon?
He ___ a famous actor in the 1990s.
___ the shops open on that public holiday?
I ___ really tired after the long journey home.
The streets ___ completely empty at midnight.
Was your teacher strict? – Yes, she ___.
The food at the restaurant ___ absolutely delicious.
___ they angry about the decision?
I ___ not at school yesterday because I had a cold.
How old ___ your grandfather when he retired?
They was very tired after the match. → Correct or Wrong?
Was it cold yesterday? – Yes, it was. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.exp: It → was, short answer: Yes, it was. ✔

exercises.q: She were at home when I called. → Correct or Wrong?
Were you nervous before the interview? → Correct or Wrong?
The party ___ amazing! Everyone had a great time.
___ your parents at home when you arrived?
She ___ only seven years old when she started playing the violin.
The roads ___ very icy this morning after the heavy snowfall.
I ___ not feeling well yesterday, so I stayed in bed all day.
___ he nervous before giving his presentation to the class?
We ___ so excited when we heard we had won the competition.
The museum ___ closed on Monday, so we couldn't get in.
___ it warm enough to sit outside in the garden?
They ___ born in the same hospital on the same day.
My grandfather ___ a carpenter before he retired twenty years ago.
The children ___ very quiet during the whole film.
Was the food good at the new restaurant? – Yes, it ___.
Where ___ you when the earthquake happened?
She ___ not happy with the results of her test.
___ the match exciting? – No, it ___ quite boring, actually.
How long ___ you at the hospital with your friend?
The train ___ late again. I had to wait for forty minutes.
We ___ the only customers in the café that rainy afternoon.
He ___ a very talented musician when he was young.

reorder.words: She was very nervous before the big exam
Were you at home when I called last night
The streets were empty and quiet at midnight
It was a cold and rainy day in November
They were not ready for the surprise inspection
Was the food at the restaurant good
I was only ten years old when we moved here
He was a famous scientist in the twentieth century
Were your parents happy when you passed your exams
The match was exciting but our team was not lucky
She was not at school yesterday because she had a cold
How old was your grandfather when he retired
We were so happy when we heard the good news
Was it warm enough to sit outside yesterday
The museum was closed so we went to the park instead
They were born in the same city on the same day
Where were you when the storm started last evening
The hotel was beautiful but the rooms were very small
My grandmother was a nurse for thirty years
Were the children quiet during the whole lesson

passage.text: Last summer, our family went on a trip to the mountains. The drive {{1}} long but the scenery {{2}} breathtaking. The roads {{3}} narrow but well-maintained. Our hotel {{4}} small but very comfortable. The staff {{5}} friendly and helpful. The weather {{6}} perfect for hiking — warm but not too hot. My brother and I {{7}} excited to explore the trails. The views from the top {{8}} incredible. At night, the stars {{9}} so bright and clear. My parents {{10}} relieved that everyone enjoyed the trip. It {{11}} truly one of the best holidays we have ever had.

My grandfather {{1}} a teacher for forty years. He {{2}} born in a small village and {{3}} the first person in his family to go to university. His school {{4}} in the centre of town and the classes {{5}} large — sometimes more than fifty students. The facilities {{6}} basic but everyone {{7}} eager to learn. My grandfather {{8}} very strict but also very fair. His students {{9}} always respectful. When he retired, the ceremony {{10}} very moving. He {{11}} so proud when former students came to thank him personally.

The concert last Friday {{1}} absolutely unforgettable. The venue {{2}} packed with fans from all over the country. The queues outside {{3}} enormous — some people {{4}} waiting for over three hours. The opening act {{5}} a young local band. They {{6}} nervous at first, but their performance {{7}} impressive. The main stage {{8}} enormous and the light show {{9}} spectacular. The crowd {{10}} wild when the headline act appeared. We {{11}} right at the front, so the sound {{12}} incredibly loud. After the show, everyone {{13}} exhausted but completely satisfied.

When I {{1}} a child, life {{2}} very different. Our house {{3}} small but always full of laughter. My parents {{4}} both hardworking and our neighbourhood {{5}} a real community. There {{6}} no smartphones or tablets — our toys {{7}} simple but fun. The summers {{8}} long and hot, and we {{9}} always outside playing. School {{10}} strict and the teachers {{11}} quite formal compared to today. My best friend {{12}} a boy called Marco who {{13}} brilliant at football. Those days {{14}} not perfect, but they {{15}} some of the happiest of my life.

The history museum exhibition last month {{1}} a great success. The theme {{2}} life in the city one hundred years ago. The photographs on display {{3}} fascinating — the clothes and hairstyles {{4}} so different from today. The streets in the old images {{5}} unpaved and the buildings {{6}} much smaller. Life {{7}} harder in many ways — there {{8}} no electricity in most homes. The average working day {{9}} ten hours long. Children {{10}} not always able to go to school. The exhibition {{11}} free to enter and the guided tours {{12}} available every hour. Visitor numbers {{13}} higher than expected.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một chuyến đi hoặc kỳ nghỉ trong quá khứ dùng was/were.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: was / were – khẳng định và phủ định
writing_prompts.example: Last year I was in Da Nang for a week. The beaches were beautiful and the weather was perfect. The hotel was comfortable but it wasn't cheap. The people were very friendly and the food was delicious.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả bản thân hoặc gia đình bạn khi còn nhỏ dùng was/were.
writing_prompts.example: When I was young, I was very shy. My brother was loud and funny. We were always arguing! My parents were both teachers. Our house was small but cosy. I was not very good at sport, but I was great at drawing.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết 5 câu hỏi về quá khứ dùng Was/Were và trả lời ngắn.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Was / Were – questions and short answers
writing_prompts.example:
Was the film interesting? – Yes, it was.
Were you tired after the journey? – Yes, I was.
Was the weather good? – No, it wasn't.
Were your friends at the party? – Yes, they were.
Was the food spicy? – No, it wasn't.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một sự kiện hoặc buổi lễ bạn đã tham dự (sinh nhật, lễ hội, buổi hòa nhạc).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: was / were to describe past events
writing_prompts.example: Last month I was at my cousin's wedding. The ceremony was beautiful and the decorations were stunning. The food was amazing and the music was fantastic. All our relatives were there. Everyone was happy and the atmosphere was very warm.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh cuộc sống ngày xưa và bây giờ bằng cách dùng was/were cho quá khứ.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: was / were for contrast with the present
writing_prompts.example: Life was very different twenty years ago. Smartphones weren't common and people were not always online. The streets were quieter and children were often outside playing. School was stricter — teachers were more formal. Now things are much faster and more connected.

beginner.title: Past Simple: Regular & Irregular verbs
beginner.content:
📌 Khi nào dùng Past Simple
• Hành động đã hoàn thành trong quá khứ, có thời điểm cụ thể
• Chuỗi hành động xảy ra liên tiếp trong quá khứ
• Trạng thái đã không còn trong quá khứ
🔑 Dấu hiệu: yesterday, last night/week/year/month, ago, in 2010, when I was young, then, after that, first… then…
📐 Công thức
(+) S + V-ed (regular) / V2 (irregular)
(-) S + didn't + V nguyên thể
(?) Did + S + V nguyên thể?
Trả lời: Yes, I did. / No, I didn't.
✏️ Quy tắc thêm -ed (Động từ có quy tắc)
1. Bình thường → thêm -ed: work→worked, walk→walked
2. Tận cùng -e → chỉ thêm -d: live→lived, love→loved
3. Tận cùng phụ âm + y → đổi y thành -ied: study→studied, carry→carried
4. Tận cùng 1 nguyên âm + 1 phụ âm (trọng âm cuối) → nhân đôi: stop→stopped, plan→planned
📋 Động từ bất quy tắc thường gặp
Nguyên thểQuá khứNghĩa
gowentđi
comecameđến
eatateăn
drinkdrankuống
seesawnhìn thấy
buyboughtmua
havehadcó
makemadelàm/tạo
taketooklấy/chụp
givegavetặng
writewroteviết
readread*đọc
runranchạy
swimswambơi
drivedrovelái
speakspokenói
knowknewbiết
thinkthoughtnghĩ
findfoundtìm thấy
loselostmất

*read (V2): đọc giống V1 nhưng phát âm /red/
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She didn't went. → ✅ She didn't go.
❌ Did he ate lunch? → ✅ Did he eat lunch?
❌ I readed the book. → ✅ I read the book.
❌ She studyed hard. → ✅ She studied hard.
She went to the market yesterday morning.Cô ấy đã đi chợ sáng hôm qua.
I didn't watch TV last night.Tôi đã không xem TV tối qua.
Where did you go for your holiday?Bạn đã đi đâu trong kỳ nghỉ?

exercises.q: I ___ to the beach last summer.
She ___ her homework yesterday.
They ___ not come to the party.
___ you see the news last night?
She ___ her keys yesterday.
She didn't went to school. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.ans: Wrong – correct: She didn't go to school

exercises.q: They ___ very tired after the trip.
When ___ she arrive?
Did he ate lunch? → Correct or Wrong?
We ___ a great time at the concert.
___ she like the present?
I ___ home after midnight last night.
I readed the book last week. → Correct or Wrong?
He ___ his bike to school yesterday.
She studyed all night. → Correct or Wrong?
They ___ at a restaurant on Sunday.
The accident ___ at 3pm yesterday.
He stoped the car suddenly. → Correct or Wrong?
I ___ (not) know the answer to that question.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ phủ định → didn't + V

exercises.q: She ___ a beautiful dress to the wedding.
He ___ (buy) a new laptop last month.
We ___ (eat) at a restaurant on Sunday.
I ___ (write) three emails this morning.
He ___ (not/know) the answer.
She ___ (study) all night for the exam.
He ___ (run) 5km yesterday morning.
They ___ (plan) the trip carefully.
She ___ (not/come) to school last Monday.
___ they ___ (arrive) on time?
He ___ (drive) to work yesterday.
I ___ (find) my keys under the sofa.
She ___ (speak) to the manager an hour ago.
We ___ (swim) in the sea every day on holiday.
He ___ (stop) the car suddenly.
My grandfather ___ (teach) maths for 30 years.
She ___ (take) many photos during her trip to Japan.
I ___ (not/sleep) well last night.
They ___ (build) this bridge two years ago.
She ___ (carry) all the bags by herself.
Where ___ you ___ (go) after school yesterday?

reorder.words: She went to the market yesterday morning
Did you see that film last weekend
He did not finish his homework last night
We had a wonderful time at the beach last summer
They arrived at the airport two hours ago
I woke up late because I forgot to set my alarm
She studied very hard and passed all her exams
Where did you go for your holiday last year
He rode his bike to school every day last year
I didn't know the answer to that question
She didn't come to the party because she felt sick

My grandfather taught mathematics for thirty years
She took many beautiful photos during her trip
He stopped the car suddenly when he saw the cat
Did she speak to the manager about the problem
I found my keys under the sofa this morning
We swam in the sea and ate fresh seafood every day
When did they arrive at the hotel last night
She carried all the heavy bags to the top floor by herself

passage.text: Last weekend, my family {{1}} to the beach. We {{2}} up early and {{3}} breakfast quickly. My dad {{4}} the car and my mum {{5}} snacks and drinks for the trip. When we {{6}} there, the sky {{7}} blue and the sea {{8}} calm. My brother and I {{9}} in the waves for two hours. We {{10}} sandcastles and {{11}} lots of photos together.

Yesterday was a very busy day for me. I {{1}} school at seven thirty. I {{2}} three difficult tests before lunch. After school, I {{3}} straight to the library and {{4}} there for two hours. Then I {{5}} to the supermarket and {{6}} some groceries for my mum. When I {{7}} home, I {{8}} dinner and {{9}} the dishes. I {{10}} my homework until eleven o'clock. I {{11}} very tired but also very proud of myself.

Last summer, my class {{1}} a trip to Ha Long Bay. We {{2}} there by overnight bus. When we {{3}} the bay, everyone {{4}} amazed by the scenery. We {{5}} on a boat and {{6}} around the islands. Some students {{7}} kayaking while others {{8}} photos. We {{9}} fresh seafood for lunch on the boat. In the evening, we {{10}} back to shore and {{11}} souvenirs for our families.

The story {{1}} on a cold winter morning. Anna {{2}} up late and {{3}} quickly. She {{4}} her bag, {{5}} her coat, and {{6}} out of the house. She {{7}} to the bus stop but the bus had already gone. She {{8}} her friend to ask for help. Her friend {{9}} her a lift to school. They {{10}} at school just before the bell {{11}}.

The football match {{1}} at seven last night. Our team {{2}} very well in the first half and {{3}} two goals. The crowd {{4}} loudly after each goal. At half-time, the coach {{5}} the players and {{6}} a new strategy. In the second half, the other team {{7}} harder and {{8}} one goal back. Our goalkeeper {{9}} two brilliant shots. In the last minute, our striker {{10}} the winning goal. The final whistle {{11}} and we all celebrated wildly.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về ngày hôm qua của bạn
writing_prompts.example: Yesterday, I woke up at 7 o'clock. I ate breakfast and went to school. In the evening, I watched TV and studied.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về kỳ nghỉ hoặc chuyến đi gần đây
writing_prompts.example: Last month, I went to Da Nang with my family. We visited the beach and ate delicious seafood. It was a wonderful trip.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một bộ phim hoặc cuốn sách bạn đã xem / đọc gần đây
writing_prompts.example: Last week, I watched a great movie. It was about a young boy who had many adventures. I thought it was really exciting.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về sinh nhật hoặc một ngày đặc biệt của bạn
writing_prompts.example: Last year, I celebrated my birthday with my friends. My parents gave me a new phone. We had a big cake and I was very happy.

writing_prompts.vi: Nói về điều bạn đã học hoặc khám phá được tuần trước
writing_prompts.example: Last week, I learned how to cook fried rice for the first time. I made some mistakes but it tasted good. I discovered I really enjoy cooking.

beginner.title: Past Simple: Negatives and Questions
beginner.content:
📌 Past Simple – Phủ định và Câu hỏi
Để tạo phủ định và câu hỏi trong Past Simple với động từ thường, dùng trợ động từ did / didn't:
• Phủ định: Subject + didn't + V (nguyên thể)
• Câu hỏi: Did + Subject + V (nguyên thể)?
⚠️ Sau did / didn't động từ luôn ở dạng nguyên thể — không chia!
📐 Công thức đầy đủ
Loại câuCông thứcVí dụ
Khẳng địnhS + V-ed / V2She watched TV. He went home.
Phủ địnhS + didn't + VShe didn't watch TV. He didn't go home.
Câu hỏi Yes/NoDid + S + V?Did she watch TV? Did he go home?
Câu hỏi Wh-Wh- + did + S + V?What did she watch? Where did he go?
✅ Trả lời ngắn (Short answers)
Did you enjoy the film? – Yes, I did. / No, I didn't.
Did she call you? – Yes, she did. / No, she didn't.
Did they win? – Yes, they did. / No, they didn't.
🔑 Wh- question words thường gặp
What did you do?  |  Where did she go?  |  When did they arrive?
Who did you meet?  |  Why did he leave?  |  How did you get here?
How long did it take?  |  How much did it cost?
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She didn't went to school. → ✅ She didn't go to school.
❌ Did he watched the film? → ✅ Did he watch the film?
❌ I didn't saw him. → ✅ I didn't see him.
❌ Did she enjoyed the party? → ✅ Did she enjoy the party?
❌ What he did yesterday? → ✅ What did he do yesterday?
She didn't come to the meeting because she was ill.Cô ấy không đến cuộc họp vì bị ốm.
Did you enjoy the concert last night? – Yes, I did.Bạn có thích buổi hòa nhạc tối qua không? – Có.
Where did they go for their summer holiday?Họ đã đi đâu cho kỳ nghỉ hè?

exercises.q: She ___ go to school yesterday because she was ill.
exercises.exp: Phủ định Past Simple → didn't + V nguyên thể

exercises.q: ___ you enjoy the film last night?
exercises.exp: Câu hỏi Past Simple → Did + S + V?

exercises.q: He didn't ___ the answer to the question.
Did they win the match? – No, they ___.
___ did you go for your birthday dinner?
I ___ finish all my homework last night. It was too much.
exercises.exp: Phủ định quá khứ → didn't + V

exercises.q: Did she call you this morning? – Yes, she ___.
___ did the meeting start? At nine or ten?
They ___ arrive on time because of the traffic jam.
___ he take the bus or the train to get there?
How much ___ the tickets cost for the concert?
She ___ tell anyone about her plans. It was a surprise.
___ did they decide to move to a new city?
We ___ see the whole museum — it closed early.
exercises.exp: didn't + see (nguyên thể, không phải saw)

exercises.q: Did your parents like the present? – Yes, they ___.
___ did you meet at the conference?
exercises.exp: Hỏi người → Who did you meet?

exercises.q: She didn't went to the party last night. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.ans: Wrong – correct: She didn't go to the party
exercises.exp: Sau didn't → V nguyên thể, không phải V-ed/V2

exercises.q: Did he enjoy the concert? – Yes, he did. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.exp: Did + S + V? → Yes, he did. ✔

exercises.q: What he did at the weekend? → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.ans: Wrong – correct: What did he do at the weekend?
exercises.exp: Câu hỏi Past Simple: Wh- + did + S + V

exercises.q: I didn't see him at the station this morning. → Correct or Wrong?
She ___ (not/eat) breakfast this morning because she was late.
___ (you/enjoy) the concert last Friday?
He ___ (not/call) me back, so I left a message.
Where ___ (they/go) for their summer holiday this year?
___ (she/pass) her driving test on the first attempt?
We ___ (not/understand) the instructions at all.
What ___ (you/do) at the weekend?
They ___ (not/finish) the project on time.
How ___ (you/get) to the airport so quickly?
___ (he/take) his umbrella this morning?
I ___ (not/sleep) well last night. I kept waking up.
Why ___ (she/leave) the party so early?
___ (they/arrive) at the hotel before midnight?
He ___ (not/buy) the jacket because it was too expensive.
How much ___ (the tickets/cost)?
___ (you/see) the match last night? It was incredible!
She ___ (not/know) anyone at the party at first.
When ___ (they/move) to their new house?
We ___ (not/find) a good restaurant so we ordered pizza.
Who ___ (you/speak) to about the problem?

reorder.words: She didn't go to school because she was ill
Did you enjoy the film last night
He didn't know the answer to the question
Where did they go for their summer holiday
I didn't finish my homework because I was tired
Did she call you this morning
What did you do at the weekend
They didn't arrive on time because of the traffic
How did you get to the airport so quickly
We didn't see the whole museum because it closed early
Did he take the bus or the train to work
Why did she leave the party so early
She didn't tell anyone about her plans
Did your parents like the surprise present
I didn't sleep well last night because of the noise
How much did the concert tickets cost
He didn't buy the jacket because it was too expensive
Who did you meet at the conference yesterday
Did they win the match or did they lose
She didn't eat breakfast because she was in a hurry

passage.text: Last weekend, my friend Ravi and I planned to go hiking. We {{1}} (wake) up early, but we {{2}} (not/check) the weather forecast. When we arrived at the trailhead, it started raining. We {{3}} (not/bring) waterproof jackets, so we got completely soaked. {{4}} (you/ever/hike) in the rain? It is not fun! We {{5}} (not/reach) the top because the path was too slippery. {{6}} (we/enjoy) the day? Not really! But we {{7}} (find) a lovely café on the way back. We {{8}} (not/go) home empty-handed — we brought back delicious homemade cake. {{9}} (the café owner/give) us a discount because we looked so miserable. We {{10}} (not/expect) that. Next time, we {{11}} (promise) to check the forecast first!

The school play last term {{1}} (be) a great success, but the rehearsals {{2}} (not/go) smoothly at first. The director {{3}} (not/choose) the cast until two weeks before the show. Some students {{4}} (not/know) their lines properly on the first night of rehearsals. {{5}} (the students/practise) every day? Yes, they {{6}}. The costume team {{7}} (not/finish) all the outfits until the morning of the show. {{8}} (the audience/enjoy) the performance? Absolutely — they {{9}} (give) a standing ovation. {{10}} (the lead actor/forget) any of her lines on stage? No, she {{11}}. She was brilliant.

My sister {{1}} (apply) for a job at a big company last month. She {{2}} (not/feel) confident at first because she {{3}} (not/have) much experience. {{4}} (she/prepare) well for the interview? Yes, she {{5}} — she practised for hours. The interviewers {{6}} (ask) her some very difficult questions. She {{7}} (not/answer) all of them perfectly, but she {{8}} (stay) calm throughout. {{9}} (they/offer) her the job on the same day? No, they {{10}} — she waited a whole week. When the email finally arrived, she {{11}} (not/believe) it at first. She was absolutely thrilled.

We {{1}} (visit) a science museum last Saturday with the whole class. We {{2}} (not/expect) it to be so fascinating. The guide {{3}} (take) us through three different sections. {{4}} (we/see) the space exhibition? Yes, we {{5}} — it was incredible. My classmate Leo {{6}} (not/want) to leave the robotics section. He {{7}} (spend) almost an hour there. {{8}} (the guide/explain) everything clearly? Yes, she {{9}} — she was excellent. I {{10}} (not/understand) some of the science at first, but the interactive displays really helped. {{11}} (we/buy) anything from the gift shop? Of course — I bought a model rocket!

Last winter, our town {{1}} (experience) its worst snowstorm in twenty years. The snow {{2}} (not/stop) for three days. Most shops {{3}} (not/open) and schools {{4}} (close) for a week. {{5}} (people/manage) to travel? No, they {{6}} — the roads were completely blocked. The local council {{7}} (not/send) enough snowploughs out quickly enough. {{8}} (the emergency services/respond) well? Yes, they {{9}} — they worked around the clock. Many families {{10}} (not/have) electricity for over forty-eight hours. Neighbours {{11}} (help) each other by sharing food and heating. It was tough, but the community spirit was remarkable.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về những gì bạn đã làm và không làm vào cuối tuần vừa rồi.
writing_prompts.example: Last weekend I went to the cinema with my friends. We watched an action film. I didn't enjoy it much because the story was confusing. On Sunday I didn't do much — I stayed at home and read a book. I didn't finish it because I fell asleep!

writing_prompts.vi: Viết 5 câu hỏi về quá khứ và trả lời chúng (có thể về bạn bè hoặc nhân vật tưởng tượng).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Past Simple – questions and short answers
writing_prompts.example:
Did you enjoy the party? – Yes, I did.
What did you eat for dinner? – I ate pasta.
Did she call you back? – No, she didn't.
Where did they go on holiday? – They went to the beach.
Did he pass his exam? – Yes, he did. He was so relieved!

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một buổi học hoặc ngày ở trường không diễn ra như mong đợi.
writing_prompts.example: Yesterday was a difficult day at school. I didn't understand the maths lesson at all. I didn't bring my homework because I left it at home. Did the teacher get angry? Yes, she did. I didn't finish the test in time either. I forgot to revise the vocabulary section.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể lại một chuyến đi hoặc sự kiện bạn đã tham gia, dùng cả khẳng định và phủ định.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Past Simple – mixed affirmative and negative
writing_prompts.example: Last month I visited the old town with my family. We walked around the market and tried local food. We didn't find a good restaurant at first but eventually we did. I didn't expect the museum to be so interesting. We didn't have time to see everything, so we plan to go back.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết đoạn hỏi đáp hội thoại ngắn về một sự kiện hoặc kỳ nghỉ dùng câu hỏi Past Simple.
writing_prompts.example:
A: Where did you go last weekend?
B: I went to the mountains with my family.
A: How did you get there?
B: We drove — it took about three hours.
A: What did you do there?
B: We hiked and visited a waterfall. It was beautiful!
A: How much did it cost?
B: Not much. We packed our own food.
